note: Per-surface target manifest for join-us multi-tool distribution. Enumerate skills by SKILL.md presence. EXCLUDES init-join-us (internal infra reproduction runbook containing a live SES credential + EC2 instance IDs + internal topology — kept local via .gitignore/.npmignore + package.json files negation, never published). target=both -> install to Claude Code AND Codex; claude-only -> Claude Code only. The Codex generator (join-us setup --codex) reads this.

surfaces.name: pr-join-us
surfaces.reason: git/gh PR convention + Copilot re-review request; tool-agnostic

surfaces.name: merge_to_dev-join-us
surfaces.reason: multi-PR sequential dev merge via gh (required-CI/stacked PR aware); tool-agnostic

surfaces.name: make-join-us-pr-report
surfaces.reason: per-PR operator report from the gh PR list (authoritative source); tool-agnostic
surfaces.caveat: optional humanize step references a humanize-korean skill

surfaces.name: monthly-report
surfaces.reason: monthly volunteer-work report from git/gh history; tool-agnostic

surfaces.name: post-wiki-join-us
surfaces.reason: publish wiki_docs/ pages to a live GitHub Wiki via the .wiki.git mirror; tool-agnostic
